steps.title: Isolate $y$
steps.content: The equation is $$y-57=px.$$ Add $57$ to both sides to undo the subtraction.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: $y=px+57$ is correct. $y=57x+p$ attaches $57$ to $x$ incorrectly, while the multiplication and division alternatives use $57$ incorrectly because the original equation subtracts $57$.
